properties.description: Master metadata-driven pipeline. Reads pipeline_metadata_config.json from Bronze ADLS, filters enabled=true entities, then calls pl_bronze_api_ingest_v4 (child pipeline) once per entity via ForEach. Adding a new entity = add one row to the config JSON, zero pipeline changes.

p_load_type.description: full or incremental — passed through to every child pipeline run

activities.name: act_read_metadata
activities.description: Lookup Activity — reads pipeline_metadata_config.json from Bronze ADLS. Returns the full JSON array of entity configs. firstRowOnly is false so all rows are returned in output.value array.

activities.name: act_foreach_entity
activities.description: Iterate over every enabled entity in the metadata config. isSequential is false — all entities run in parallel (max 20 concurrent). Each iteration calls the child pipeline with entity-specific parameters.

activities.name: act_ingest_entity
activities.description: Execute child pipeline for this entity. Passes entity_name, api_path, page_size, and load_type from metadata config and master pipeline parameter.
